summary: Completed testing of backend APIs (authentication, students, teachers, departments, reports) and frontend pages (login, dashboard, students, teachers, reports, settings). All backend APIs pass. Key finding: QuickNav floating button component exists with code fixes but is NOT rendered anywhere in the app.

minor.issue: Student login with provided credentials (234/123456) failed - password may be different

ui_bugs.issue: QuickNav floating button component (blue circle with grid icon) is NOT rendered anywhere in the app. The component code exists at /app/frontend/src/components/QuickNav.tsx with fixes (Pressable stopPropagation, corrected routes), but it's never imported or used in any layout or page.

integration_issues.issue: Students page shows loading spinner initially but loads correctly after ~5-8 seconds. This is due to fetching 72+ students from API.

issues: Unexpected text node warning in Views

action_items: CRITICAL: Add QuickNav component to app layout to make floating button visible. The component exists but is not imported/rendered anywhere
Import QuickNav in _layout.tsx or wrap pages with it
Example: import { QuickNav } from '../../src/components/QuickNav' and add <QuickNav /> inside the layout
critical_code_review_comments: QuickNav.tsx exists at /app/frontend/src/components/QuickNav.tsx with proper fixes (Pressable stopPropagation on line 104, corrected routes /students and /manage-teachers on lines 40-41)
QuickNav is NOT imported or rendered anywhere in the app - grep found no imports of QuickNav
QuickNav uses useAuth from AuthContext which exists at /app/frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx
firebase_service.py has push notification enhancements (default_sound, default_vibrate_timings, visibility) already in place
Console shows multiple deprecation warnings for shadow* props and pointerEvents

success_rate.frontend: 90% - All pages load correctly but QuickNav not rendered

context_for_next_testing_agent: QuickNav component exists with proper code fixes but needs to be added to the app layout to render. Backend APIs all working. All pages (login, dashboard, students, teachers, reports, settings) load correctly.

verified_features.POST /api/auth/login (admin): PASS - Returns access_token and user info
verified_features.Login page UI: PASS - Displays correctly with Arabic RTL layout
verified_features.Dashboard UI (admin): PASS - Shows stats (72 students, 3 teachers, 5 courses, 4 departments)
verified_features./students page: PASS - Loads with 72 students, search and filter functionality
verified_features./manage-teachers page: PASS - Shows 3 teachers with action buttons
verified_features./reports page: PASS - Shows report types with system summary
verified_features.QuickNav floating button: NOT RENDERED - Component exists but not added to layout

rca_of_the_issue: QuickNav Issue RCA: The QuickNav.tsx component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/QuickNav.tsx. The code has the fixes mentioned in the review request (Pressable with stopPropagation to prevent event bubbling, corrected routes from /add-student to /students and /add-teacher to /manage-teachers). However, the component is NEVER imported or rendered in any layout or page file. Running grep for 'import.*QuickNav' and '<QuickNav' across the frontend codebase returns no results outside of QuickNav.tsx itself. To fix: Import and add <QuickNav /> to the main app layout (_layout.tsx) or individual pages.
